data.current_description: Generate outlines for a presentation.
data.description_suggestion: Generate presentation outlines synchronously based on the provided topic, content, and configuration. Use this for synchronous outline generation when you need results without polling.

data.current_description: Create a presentation from JSON specification synchronously.
data.summary_suggestion: Create presentation from JSON specification synchronously
data.description_suggestion: Create a presentation synchronously from a JSON specification. Accepts a CreateFromJsonRequest containing presentation structure, content, and styling. Returns the generated presentation immediately. Use this for synchronous creation when you need results without polling. For longer operations, consider the async endpoint.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about inputs, outputs, and when to use this versus async alternatives. Added clarity on request schema expectations, return value, execution model, and guidance for AI agents to choose between sync and async endpoints based on use case.

Current description mentions checking status but lacks detail about the response format and when to use async versus sync. Added clarity on return value (AsyncTaskModel with task ID), polling mechanism, and use case guidance to help AI agents understand the asynchronous workflow.

data.current_description: Create a presentation from JSON specification asynchronously. Check status via async task endpoint.
data.description_suggestion: Create a presentation asynchronously from a JSON specification. Accepts a CreateFromJsonRequest containing presentation structure, content, and styling. Returns an AsyncTaskModel with a task ID for polling. Use the async task endpoint with the returned task ID to check generation status and retrieve results. Recommended for complex presentations or when non-blocking behavior is needed.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions checking status but lacks detail about the response format and when to use async versus sync. Added clarity on return value (AsyncTaskModel with task ID), polling mechanism, and use case guidance to help AI agents understand the asynchronous workflow.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the current status of an asynchronous task by its ID. data.current_description: Upload an image file to the platform.
data.description_suggestion: Upload an image file to the platform for use in presentations. Supported formats include JPEG, PNG, and WebP.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic. Enhanced version specifies that images become reusable assets, explains the return value structure (ImageAsset), mentions supported formats, and clarifies how uploaded images integrate with presentation generation workflows.

data.current_description: Delete an uploaded image by its identifier.
data.description_suggestion: Delete an uploaded image asset by its ID. Permanently removes the image from your account. The image will no longer be available for use in new presentations, but existing presentations that reference this image are not affected. Returns a success confirmation.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks important side effect information. Enhanced version clarifies that deletion is permanent, explains the impact on future presentations versus existing ones, and specifies the return value. data.current_description: Generate a presentation synchronously and return the result immediately.

data.current_description: Subscribe to a webhook event.
data.description_suggestion: Subscribe to webhook events for the authenticated user. Requires specifying the event type and callback URL in the request. Returns the created webhook subscription with a unique subscription ID. The subscription will remain active until explicitly unsubscribed, and events matching the subscription criteria will be delivered to the specified callback URL.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about inputs (event type, callback URL), outputs (subscription ID), and side effects (active subscription, event delivery). Enhanced version provides complete context for AI agents to understand subscription mechanics.

message: Operation 'unsubscribeFromWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Original description doesn't specify what input is required (subscription ID) or the side effects (permanent deletion, event delivery stops). Enhanced version clarifies the required parameter and the consequences of the action.

data.current_description: Remove an existing webhook subscription.
data.description_suggestion: Remove an existing webhook subscription by its subscription ID. Requires the subscription ID in the request. Once unsubscribed, no further events will be delivered to the associated callback URL, and the subscription will be permanently deleted.
data.reasoning: Original description doesn't specify what input is required (subscription ID) or the side effects (permanent deletion, event delivery stops). Enhanced version clarifies the required parameter and the consequences of the action.

message: Operation 'unsubscribeAllWebhooks' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity about the scope and side effects. Enhanced version emphasizes that this is a bulk operation affecting all subscriptions, clarifies the permanent nature of deletion, and explains the consequence (all event delivery stops).

data.current_description: Unsubscribe from all webhook subscriptions of the user.
data.description_suggestion: Remove all active webhook subscriptions for the authenticated user in a single operation. This action permanently deletes all subscriptions and stops event delivery to all associated callback URLs. No further events will be delivered after this operation completes.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about the scope and side effects. Enhanced version emphasizes that this is a bulk operation affecting all subscriptions, clarifies the permanent nature of deletion, and explains the consequence (all event delivery stops).

message: Operation 'subscribeToWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Subscribe to a webhook event.
data.description_suggestion: Subscribe to webhook events for the authenticated user. Requires a webhook URL and event type in the request body. Returns the created webhook subscription with a unique subscription ID. The webhook will receive POST requests when specified events occur (e.g., presentation generation completion).
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about what inputs are required, what is returned, and what side effects occur. Added information about request requirements, response structure, and webhook behavior for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'unsubscribeFromWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Original description doesn't specify what input is needed or what the side effect is. Added details about the required subscription ID parameter, the effect of removal (no more notifications), and confirmation response for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Remove an existing webhook subscription.
data.description_suggestion: Remove a specific webhook subscription by its subscription ID. Requires the subscription ID in the request. After removal, the webhook will no longer receive event notifications. Returns confirmation of successful unsubscription.
data.reasoning: Original description doesn't specify what input is needed or what the side effect is. Added details about the required subscription ID parameter, the effect of removal (no more notifications), and confirmation response for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'unsubscribeAllWebhooks' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks information about the destructive nature of this operation and its side effects. Added warning about irreversibility and clarification that all subscriptions are removed, helping AI agents understand the significance of this action.

data.current_description: Unsubscribe from all webhook subscriptions of the user.
data.description_suggestion: Remove all webhook subscriptions for the authenticated user in a single operation. After execution, no webhooks will receive event notifications. Returns confirmation of successful removal of all subscriptions. This is a destructive operation that cannot be easily reversed.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks information about the destructive nature of this operation and its side effects. Added warning about irreversibility and clarification that all subscriptions are removed, helping AI agents understand the significance of this action.
